description: Curated keyword-to-signal mapping for TMDb keyword-derived watch guidance.

alien.notes: Use as broad sci-fi expectation only.

animation.notes: Animation format signal, not a quality claim.

artificial intelligence.notes: Useful for sci-fi identity and expectation.

based on comic.notes: Adaptation context that can support superhero/comic guidance.

dream.notes: Use for broad watch feel, not plot explanation.

monster.notes: Do not overstate scares from keyword alone.

murder.notes: High-level expectation only, not a detailed warning.

romance.notes: Avoid promising romance as primary plot.

serial killer.notes: Use as high-level watch expectation, not as detailed content warning.

war.notes: Tone/topic expectation, not detailed content advisory.

1940s.notes: Period context; do not turn into audience label directly.

1980s.notes: Period context; do not turn into audience label directly.

artificial intelligence ai.notes: Alias for artificial intelligence keyword variants.

complex.notes: Use gently; complexity is a weak keyword-only signal.

dark fantasy.notes: Fantasy identity plus darker watch feel.

disaster.notes: Disaster premise; avoid detailed warning language.

horror.notes: Genre expectation without graphic warning language.

medieval.notes: Setting signal; fantasy only weakly inferred.

nuclear catastrophe.notes: Use as disaster/history signal, not a graphic warning.

psychological thriller.notes: Thriller expectation and intensity, not review consensus.

slow burn.notes: Reusable pacing cue for slower, more patient watch profiles.

tense.notes: Direct tension cue from provider keyword.

suspense.notes: Direct suspense cue from provider keyword.

stranded.notes: Survival setup without overclaiming danger details.

battle.notes: War/combat cue focused on theme rather than graphic warning.

mafia war.notes: Organized crime power-conflict cue, not a war-drama cue.

artificial intelligence a i.notes: Alias for TMDb artificial intelligence punctuation variant.

island.notes: Island-survival setting cue when TMDb uses it as a keyword.

depression.notes: Mental-health theme cue without diagnostic claims.

anger.notes: Emotion-character cue for animated family stories.

anxiety.notes: Emotion-character cue for animated family stories.

fear.notes: Emotion-character cue for animated family stories.

joy.notes: Emotion-character cue for animated family stories.

sadness.notes: Emotion-character cue for animated family stories.

disgust.notes: Emotion-character cue for animated family stories.

envy.notes: Emotion-character cue for animated family stories.

embarrasment.notes: Emotion-character cue for animated family stories.

body horror.notes: Body-horror cue without graphic warning detail.

disfigurement.notes: Body-horror cue without graphic warning detail.

holocaust (shoah).notes: World War II atrocity context cue.

concentration camp.notes: World War II atrocity context cue.

auschwitz-birkenau concentration camp.notes: World War II atrocity context cue.

genocide.notes: World War II atrocity context cue.

nazi.notes: World War II atrocity context cue.

nazi officer.notes: World War II atrocity context cue.
